full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #5 (2026-04-18)

PULSE
Health: 0.516 (C). 876 wallets, 135 contributors. 68 memos today vs 134 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
56 reward payments, 301794 PFT distributed to 25 contributors. Top earner: rDVKRNp3kWE1... (46408 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 19,000 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6CK9dz9... (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFvpMuDHf... (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6CK9dz9... (69,600 PFT, avg 9,943/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rsS2Y6CK9dz9... (68 memos). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 5 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 83.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-19): 8297 transactions from 83 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrMChCsao...

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
